title: Mamplan
description: Schema for Mampok Mamplan configuration files.

project.description: Core project configuration. This section is mandatory.

files.description: File paths relative to the project folder to upload.

init_container.description: List of additional init container types (Mamplate tool names).

creation_date.description: Project creation date in ISO 8601 UTC datetime format (e.g. 2024-01-31T12:00:00Z).

deployment.description: Deployment configuration. If omitted, Mampok auto-generates it on first run. Cluster has no default and must always be set explicitly.

custom_url_id.description: Optional replacement for the project-id in the URL path. When set, this value replaces the project-id in the URL. Domain, namespace, and tool always come from the config. No capital letters or underscores allowed.

random_url_suffix.description: Append 5 random characters to the deployment URL.

container.description: Container configuration. Any field from the referenced MaMplate can be overridden here. All fields are optional.

main.description: Overrides for the main container. All MaMplate fields are available.

init.description: Overrides for the init container. All MaMplate fields are available.

analyst.description: List of usernames of the data analysts responsible for this project.

datatype.description: List of data types associated with this project.

download_allowed.description: Whether data download from the container is permitted.

metadata.description: List of IDs referencing associated experimental metadata.

organization.description: Organization or department names. Use 'public' for publicly accessible projects.

user.description: List of usernames with access to this project.

tags.description: Optional free-form metadata tags. No validation is applied — any additional keys are allowed.

pubmedid.description: PubMed identifier for an associated publication.

project_id.description: Unique project identifier. No capital letters or underscores allowed.

tool.description: Name of the MaMplate tool to use.

lifetime.description: Project expiration date in ISO 8601 UTC datetime format (e.g. 2024-12-31T00:00:00Z).

status.description: Indicates whether the deployment is currently active.

url.description: Full deployment URL (automatically constructed from config components and stored here). No capital letters or underscores allowed.

cluster.description: Target cluster identifier. Must always be set explicitly — no default.

bucket.description: S3 storage bucket name. No capital letters or underscores allowed.
